cards.back: A mathematical model for computation that can read and write symbols on an infinite tape
A set of production rules that define the structure of a string and allow for its generation and recognition
A type of automaton that uses a stack to remember information and recognize regular languages
A language that can be recognized by a finite automaton, i.e., a machine that can be described by a finite number of states and transitions
A set of production rules that define the structure of a string and allow for its generation and recognition, used to define context-free languages
